problem: What triggers cancer cells to leave primary tumor and colonize new tissue?
hypothesis: Telomerase activation/inhibition in target cells may resolve What triggers cancer cells to leave primary tumor and colonize new tissue? by blocking at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Randomized controlled trial Phase I with 19 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
